observations.title: Structure before interpretation
observations.body: Walking the path between Freedom and Embodiment, I noticed how often I reach for a story before I feel the constraint. The terrain here asks something quieter: what was already holding the shape?
Returned to the same question three times today — each time through a different essay. Not repetition. More like orbit.

observations.title: Perception at the threshold
observations.body: What organizes seeing before interpretation — I wrote that down before I understood it. Still don't. But the question has a weight now.
